prompt:
Add adb to the default dev shell in flake.nix.

Context: flake.nix already has a separate devShells.android that pulls in the full Android SDK (which contains adb). The user wants adb available in the *default* devShell too without paying the multi-GB SDK cost.

Change to make in /home/patrick/hack/flux/flake.nix:
- In devShells.default.buildInputs (around lines 27-31), add 'android-tools' to the list. The nixpkgs 'android-tools' package provides adb/fastboot as standalone binaries (no SDK, no unfree licensing needed).
- Update the shellHook echo block (lines 33-39) to mention adb is available, e.g. add a line like:  echo "  adb devices       - list connected Android devices"

Do NOT touch:
- devShells.test
- devShells.android (it already has adb via the full SDK)
- packages.default
- npmDepsHash

Acceptance criteria:
- 'nix develop' in the repo root drops into a shell where 'adb --version' works.
- 'nix flake check' (or at minimum 'nix develop --command true') succeeds.
- flake.nix remains formatted with nixfmt-rfc-style (run 'nix fmt' or 'nixfmt flake.nix' before committing).
- Open a PR with a short description explaining adb was added to the default shell via android-tools (not the full SDK).
